---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill for this collection
title: "[skill request] "
labels: ["skill request"]
---

## Proposed skill name

In kebab-case, e.g. `processing-pdfs`. Avoid the reserved prefixes `claude-` and `anthropic-`.

## Intended use case

What concrete task should this skill help Claude with? Describe the kind of prompts that should trigger it (a few real examples beat one abstract description).

## Why an existing skill does not fit

Briefly explain why none of the skills in `README.md` already cover this. If a related skill exists, say what is materially different.

## Sketch of the workflow

Two or three bullets describing what the skill would tell Claude to do. No need to draft the SKILL.md here — the goal of this issue is to confirm scope before someone authors it.

## Are you willing to author it?

Yes / No / Maybe. Either is fine — this issue is useful as a backlog signal even if no one has time today.
